commands.review_summary:
The branch defaults WebChat-created message tools to the internal source-reply sink when no explicit source delivery mode is supplied, and adds focused message-tool tests for the default and explicit automatic modes.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +31. Total +40 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main leaves WebChat message-tool sends without message_tool_only unless a caller supplies it, while the internal sink requires that mode before targetless delivery. I did not run a live WebChat session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No repair job is needed because the patch is already a plausible focused fix; the next blocker is contributor real-behavior proof and maintainer review.

target.title: fix(message): route WebChat message tool sends to source sink
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #96840.

Targetless `message.send` calls created for WebChat source turns were still using automatic source delivery, so the outbound runner required an explicit target even though WebChat should provide the internal source-reply sink for message-tool sends.

## Why This Change Was Made

The fix keeps ordinary WebChat room-event turns on automatic source delivery, but defaults WebChat-constructed message tools to `message_tool_only` unless a caller explicitly supplies another source delivery mode. That keeps the existing gateway routing behavior intact while giving targetless WebChat message-tool sends the internal sink they need.

## User Impact

WebChat agents can call `message.send` without an explicit target when replying to the current source, matching the documented/source-backed behavior. Explicit automatic source delivery remains preserved for callers that request it.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/message-tool.test.ts --testNamePattern 'webchat message tools|source delivery for webchat' --reporter dot --maxWorkers 1`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.send-validation.test.ts --testNamePattern 'internal UI source|outside message-tool-only|explicit message routes' --reporter verbose --maxWorkers 1`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/tool-resolution.test.ts --testNamePattern 'webchat room-event|routed webchat' --reporter verbose --maxWorkers 1`
- `git diff --check`
- `/Users/harjothk/.local/bin/python3.12 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

AI assistance disclosure: Codex helped identify the source-sink boundary, implement the patch, and run the listed local proof.
target.author: harjothkhara
